things.name: Church of Saint Lazarus
things.description: 9th-century Byzantine church housing the tomb of Lazarus, raised from the dead by Jesus

things.name: Larnaca Salt Lake
things.description: Flamingo habitat in winter, the second largest salt lake in Cyprus and a protected wetland

things.name: Hala Sultan Tekke
things.description: One of Islam's most sacred mosques beside the salt lake, built over the tomb of the Prophet's aunt

things.name: Larnaca Fort & Medieval Museum
things.description: 14th-century fort with Byzantine, medieval and Ottoman exhibits on the seafront

things.name: Finikoudes Promenade
things.description: Palm-lined seafront promenade with cafes, tavernas and the city's main beach

things.name: Choirokoitia Neolithic Settlement
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 7,000 year old Neolithic village with reconstructed circular dwellings

things.name: Kiti Angeloktisti Church
things.description: One of the oldest churches in Cyprus with a rare 5th-century Byzantine mosaic of the Virgin

things.name: Cape Kiti & Mackenzie Beach
things.description: Larnaca's best sandy beach below the airport flight path - perfect for plane spotters

things.name: Zenon of Citium Statue
things.description: Monument to Stoic philosopher Zenon, born in ancient Citium (Larnaca) in 334 BC

things.name: Lefkara Village
things.description: Day trip to UNESCO-listed lace and silver filigree village in the Troodos foothills
